translation.literal_translation: If it be said that for some people the inferential entity is scripturally taught, no: because what is taken up is arranged in the body-metaphor, and this is also shown. (1)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.4.1 denies that Katha's avyakta validates Sankhya Pradhana; the referent is fixed by ratha-rupaka contextual uptake.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra compression of the contextual-semantics rebuttal.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated against local adhikarana flow and neighboring translated blocks.
A final philological pass can still refine register and Sanskrit term granularity.
